text.title: Requirements Lifecycle Management Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real engagements applying requirements-lifecycle. Each entry pairs symptom + root cause + fix.

antipattern.root-cause: Author edits in place under pressure.
antipattern.fix: State machine rejects backward transitions; rollback requires explicit record.

antipattern.symptom: Change approved by one role only.
antipattern.fix: Multi-role sign-off (BA + Product + Architecture + QA) mandatory.

antipattern.symptom: Change applied without impact analysis on linked artifacts.
antipattern.fix: Block change without impact-analysis attachment; RTM consumes it.
History is append-only; any correction is a new entry.
